text:
Vocational and prevocational assessment and training that is directed toward the 
restoration of function in the activities of daily living lost due to illness or injury would 
be covered. Where vocational or prevocational assessment and training is related solely 
to specific employment opportunities, work skills, or work settings, such services would 
not be covered because they would not be directed toward the treatment of an illness or 
injury. 

40.2.4.3 - Illustration of Covered
